title: Skill Discovery, Trigger Descriptions, and Boundaries · Skill Brief: Description Triggers
summary: Make explicit and implicit invocation reliable without false positives. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext description triggers increment in a trigger evaluation dataset. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Front-load use cases and trigger terms in a concise skill description.
Keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
